findings.message: mod.ts is 247 lines; convention cap is 200 — split into sub-entrypoints
mod.ts has 171 non-export/non-comment lines — barrels must be export-only
README missing 12/12 mandated sections (Overview, Quickstart, Mental model, API, Recipes, Configuration, Testing, Observability, Architecture, Stability, Compatibility, License)
no tests/ directory and no inline *_test.ts files — every package needs meaningful tests
mod.ts does not export an `inspect<Noun>()` diagnostic — recommended discoverability axis
